compliance_patterns.description: International tenders vary widely but generally require company credentials and financial health documentation
International clients often expect alignment with globally recognized standards

evaluator_insights.insight: International clients value demonstrated cross-border delivery capability
evaluator_insights.implication: Proposals must show experience delivering across multiple geographies and cultures
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Highlight international project portfolio and multi-geography team capabilities

evaluator_insights.insight: International evaluators expect methodology aligned with global standards
evaluator_insights.implication: Proprietary-only methodologies without recognized framework underpinning score lower
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Ground methodology in internationally recognized frameworks (PMBOK, TOGAF, ITIL, etc.)

forbidden_assumptions: Do NOT assume MENA-specific regulations apply to international clients
Do NOT assume Arabic language capability is required unless explicitly stated
Do NOT reference any country-specific national vision or program unless the RFP mentions it
IMPORTANT: This is a FALLBACK pack — jurisdiction-specific compliance requires manual review
